_meta.description: Tech/app vocabulary for the Northstar Digital Literacy computer-basics class. NOT shared with OCE_TRANSLATOR — that kiosk uses a separate OCE&E benefits/workforce glossary, since the two tools cover different subject matter. Pre-processed before translation API calls so these terms aren't mangled by the translator.
_meta.review_note: All entries below are app/platform proper nouns and acronyms that are conventionally left in Latin script across languages. Confirm with a native speaker for each language before classroom use, especially for Arabic/Farsi (RTL embedding) and Chinese (some platforms have an official localized name in addition to the Latin-script one).
